case_title: NEWDORF DAVID B. et al VS EDWARDS GEORGE C. JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NEWDORF DAVID B. SINDEL CHERYL A. AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS GEORGE C. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EDWARDS GEORGE C. JR. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NEWDORF DAVID B. SINDEL CHERYL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS GEORGE C. JR.
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-15-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF NOV-08-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-18-1996, OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT EDWARDS GEORGE C. JR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NEWDORF DAVID B. SINDEL CHERYL A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO GEORGE EDWARDS JR RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS GEORGE C. JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEWDORF DAVID B. SINDEL CHERYL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS GEORGE C. JR. $1,900.94 PRINCIPAL, $71.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,971.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-08-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
